notes: A figure denoting extreme danger, the most desperate circumstances. If the woman in travail has not strength to bring forth the child which has come to the mouth of the womb, both the life of the child and that of the mother are exposed to the greatest danger; and this was the condition of the people here (see the similar figure in [Hosea 13:13]). (Keil and Delitzsch, Commentary, 1:3:442.)
JST "they who were left arose" [The Joseph Smith Translation clarifies that the people who arose were "they who were left".]
